title: OcelotPack
description: Adds many optimisation mods, as well as OptiFine parity and other small features. Big FPS improvement. Fully server-compatible and client-only. Not sponsored.
body:
> ##### Modpack on hold
> I no longer play Minecraft. You can contact me at <https://roundabout-host.com/roundabout>

# OcelotPack
Forget about "doubling" your FPS. We can do better.

This is a Minecraft modpack on Fabric, focusing on optimisation, customisation and stability. The goal is not to have any opinionated stuff here. This could just as well be vanilla.
Inspired by Fabulously Optimized and the OptiFine alternatives by LambdAurora.

# Features
* Huge FPS boost - see images!
* Resource pack features - OptiFine parity!
* Nice connected textures, dynamic lights, shaders and F3 menu!
* See further on servers!
* Zoom your view!
* Low memory usage!
* Get free, custom capes!
* Play with your controller!
* Open source!
* [And more](https://github.com/OcelotProjects/ocelotpack/wiki/Mod-List)

![comparison1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yWMtu4hI/images/e9c721e0d3f1ef9501df3aec337c0d8f8dda6626.png)
|              | CPU              | GPU                               | RAM (max allocated) | Resolution | Vanilla | Modpack | Modpack relative |
|--------------|------------------|-----------------------------------|---------------------|------------|---------|---------|------------------|
| _(pictured)_ | Intel i7-8565U   | Integrated Intel UHD Graphics 620 | 6144M               | 1920x1080  | 16      | 100     | 625%             |
|              | Intel i9-13900KF | nVidia RTX 3060 Ti LHR            | 6144M               | 1920x1080  | 118     | 844     | 715%             |

Default settings, but VSync is disabled and Max FPS is unlimited.
[Check out the wiki for more info](https://github.com/OcelotProjects/ocelotpack/wiki)
